name: Zhejiang Jinfei Kaida Wheel Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jinfei Kaida Wheel Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells aluminum alloy auto wheels in China. The company offers motorcycle and automobile wheels, bicycle and motorcycle rims, and electric motorcycle wheels. It also exports its products to approximately 10 countries, including the United States, Japan, the United Kingdom, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, etc. The company is based in Jinhua, China.
